headline: Trump Floats Rally Speech After Musical Acts Abandon 250th Event
summary: (Bloomberg) -- President Donald Trump responded to a wave of cancellations by artists who were scheduled to perform in Washington for the US’s 250th birthday by proposing himself as a better alternative.Most Read from BloombergAmericans Injured in Iranian Missile Strike on Kuwaiti Air BaseStrait of Hormuz Ship Transits Are Rising Thanks to US HelpCVS Returns Zepbound to Drug Plans After Lilly Slashes PriceAmericans Hurt in Kuwait as Trump Sends Mixed Signals on WarSingapore Hands Byju's Founder
